title: 96pcs Winter Frozen Snowflake Tableware Set Frozen Birthday Party Supplies with Paper Plates Cups Napkins for Christmas Winter Wonderland Themed Birthday Party Decor
features: 【Package Includes】You will receive a blue white snowflake dinnerware set which can serve 24 guests. Including 24pcs 9" paper Plates, 24pcs 7" paper Plates, 24pcs 9oz paper Cups, 24pcs 6.5" paper Napkins, perfect for racing car sports theme party.

【Premium Material】All of the Party Go paper tableware are made of quality paper, non-toxic, no smell, heat-resistant, thick and sturdy enough to hold food and desserts. The color are well-printed and fade-resistant to provide you a perfect party.

【Fit Most Occasions】These snowflake theme party packs are perfect complement to most occasions, such as Birthday party, Graduation, Anniversary, Baby Shower, Holidays, Celebrations,christmas party,winter frozen party decoration and so on. They will easily catch people's eyes and bring them happy.

【Enjoy Your Party】The party plates, cups and napkins can save your cleaning time due to the disposable design, simply throw them into the trash after the event. You can spend more time enjoying the party and accompanying your family and friends.
【Perfect Design】Featuring classic style design, decorating your winter snowflake theme party with these disposable plates, cups and napkins can make your party looks more funny and impressive.
